_snapshot: SyncView Samples — Reorder (3WDxAYW23RBJTuFW), LIVE active version captured 2026-06-15 immediately before adding the Supabase dual-write mirror. activeVersionId 11df3892-ed62-4965-8727-590e9f56cf2a. n8n's own version history is the authoritative rollback; this is a convenience reference.
name: SyncView Samples — Reorder
description: POST /webhook/samples-reorder. Body {client, items[{id,order_index}]}. Uses Google Sheets update (not appendOrUpdate) so unknown ids are silently skipped instead of creating phantom rows in Samples_<slug>.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { ok: true, updated: items.length } }];
